name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers who need quick access to funds or affordable merchandise. FirstCash employs approximately 22,000 people across the United States, Latin America, and the United Kingdom, and is listed in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index.

FirstCash's core service is providing non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, meaning borrowers are not personally liable if they default. The company buys and sells a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Additional services include gold/precious metals buying, layaway plans with 10% down payments, and retail sales of inventory. Through its subsidiary AFF, FirstCash also provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive geographic footprint—operating in all Mexican states plus Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador internationally—and its technology-driven point-of-sale systems. The company's scale allows for consistent service across locations and a deep inventory of merchandise. Their layaway service offers an alternative to traditional credit, requiring only 10% down with no interest charges mentioned.

Pawn loans are fundamentally different from credit-based lending: they require collateral but don't require credit checks or impact credit scores. However, pawn loans typically carry short repayment periods (often 30-90 days) and high effective interest rates despite low stated loan-to-value ratios. This makes them suitable only for short-term cash needs, not ongoing financial solutions. The merchandise resale aspect creates additional appeal but prices may be higher than retail alternatives.
pros: Over 3,300 locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America for accessibility
No credit check required for pawn loans—does not impact credit score
Fast cash on-the-spot transactions without lengthy approval processes
Buys wide variety of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, and musical instruments
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers are not personally liable if collateral is forfeited
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment alternative to credit
Component company in S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices—established, regulated entity
cons: Pawn loans typically have short repayment periods (commonly 30-90 days), creating refinancing pressure
Effective annual interest rates are often very high despite low stated loan-to-value percentages
Loss of personal property if loan cannot be repaid—items are sold to cover debt
Merchandise prices may be higher than retail alternatives or online marketplaces
Limited to personal property collateral—cannot help consumers without items of value
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs who lack access to traditional credit
People with items of value they're willing to temporarily part with for quick liquidity
Unbanked or underbanked individuals without credit history or access to bank loans
Shoppers seeking used merchandise at discounted prices compared to retail
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked consumers and those with urgent short-term cash needs who have personal property to pledge as collateral. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are extremely expensive short-term financing with high effective interest rates and short repayment windows, making them unsuitable for ongoing financial needs—they should only be used when no other options exist and the borrower can realistically repay within 30-90 days.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, and appliances
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
